_comment: 破壁 / GlobalInfo — 论文 channel (常驻精选, not lookback-gated). Reading lists from the 'Saturday Robotics & World Models Reading Club' (SF, host Junfan Zhu / @saturdayrobotic, https://luma.com/saturdayrobotic). Covers the Dreamer-series review (Club 07) plus per-session selections (Clubs 05/08/10/12/13/17). Every entry links its arXiv/publisher original — 永远链接原文, 绝不编造; all links verified to resolve. The builder (scripts/lib/curated.mjs) turns each into a link-style read-queue item seeded into 待读清单. date = the paper's arXiv month (YYMM). summaryZh is a faithful, title-derived editorial note (authors left blank rather than invented).

papers.title: World Models（世界模型 · 开山之作）
papers.summaryZh: 世界模型领域的奠基论文：智能体先学一个对环境的压缩生成式「世界模型」(VAE + RNN)，再在这个「想象」出来的模型里训练控制策略，而非直接在真实环境里试错。提出了「在模型内做梦式训练」的范式，是后续 Dreamer 系列的思想源头。理解具身智能与机器人「世界模型」叙事的起点。
papers.descEn: Foundational world-models paper (Ha & Schmidhuber): an agent learns a compressed generative 'world model' (VAE + RNN) of its environment, then trains its controller inside that imagined model rather than the real environment. Introduces the 'train by dreaming inside the model' paradigm that the later Dreamer line builds on. The starting point for understanding the embodied-AI / robotics 'world model' narrative.

papers.title: PlaNet：从像素学习的隐空间动力学规划
papers.summaryZh: Deep Planning Network (PlaNet)：直接从像素学习一个隐空间的环境动力学模型，并在隐空间中做规划，用远少于无模型 RL 的交互次数完成连续控制任务。把「学动力学 + 规划」推进到高维视觉输入，是 Dreamer 的前身。
papers.descEn: PlaNet (Deep Planning Network): learns a latent-space dynamics model directly from pixels and plans in that latent space, solving continuous-control tasks with far fewer environment interactions than model-free RL. Pushes 'learn dynamics + plan' to high-dimensional visual input; the direct precursor to Dreamer.

papers.title: Dream to Control（Dreamer）：在隐空间想象中学习行为
papers.summaryZh: Dreamer：在学到的隐空间世界模型里「想象」长程轨迹，并通过可微分的价值反传来高效学习策略与价值函数。在仅用世界模型的情况下大幅超越此前方法，奠定了 DreamerV2/V3 的整体框架。
papers.descEn: Dreamer: learns behaviors by 'imagining' long-horizon trajectories inside a learned latent world model and propagating analytic value gradients back through it, learning policy and value functions efficiently. Substantially outperforms prior methods using only the world model; establishes the framework carried into DreamerV2/V3.

papers.title: Mastering Atari with Discrete World Models（DreamerV2）
papers.summaryZh: DreamerV2：用离散隐变量的世界模型，在 Atari 上首次让「纯在世界模型里训练」的智能体达到人类水平，且只用单块 GPU。证明了离散表征对世界模型的有效性。
papers.descEn: DreamerV2: a world model with discrete latent variables that, for the first time, lets an agent trained purely inside the world model reach human-level performance on Atari — on a single GPU. Demonstrates the effectiveness of discrete representations for world models.

papers.title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models（DreamerV3）
papers.summaryZh: DreamerV3：一套固定超参的世界模型算法横跨 150+ 任务（含从零在 Minecraft 中挖到钻石，无需人类数据），展示了世界模型方法的通用性与可扩展性。是「通用控制基础模型」叙事的关键一步。
papers.descEn: DreamerV3: a single world-model algorithm with fixed hyperparameters that succeeds across 150+ tasks (including collecting diamonds from scratch in Minecraft with no human data), showing the generality and scalability of world-model methods. A key step toward the 'foundation model for control' narrative.

papers.title: DayDreamer：用世界模型让真实机器人快速在线学习
papers.summaryZh: DayDreamer：把 Dreamer 直接搬到真实物理机器人上，让四足、机械臂等在数小时内、无需仿真即可在线学会运动与操作技能。世界模型「样本效率高」这一优势在真机上的有力验证，对机器人落地极具参考意义。
papers.descEn: DayDreamer: applies Dreamer directly on real physical robots, letting quadrupeds, arms and others learn locomotion and manipulation online within hours and without simulation. A strong real-world validation of the sample-efficiency advantage of world models — highly relevant to robotics deployment.

papers.title: Director：在世界模型中进行分层规划
papers.summaryZh: Director：在学到的世界模型隐空间里做分层强化学习——高层管理者设定子目标、低层工人执行，从而解决需要长程探索的稀疏奖励任务。把世界模型与分层决策结合的代表作。
papers.descEn: Director: hierarchical reinforcement learning inside the latent space of a learned world model — a high-level manager sets subgoals and a low-level worker executes them, solving sparse-reward tasks that require long-horizon exploration. A representative combination of world models with hierarchical decision-making.

papers.title: Dynalang：用语言预测未来的多模态世界模型
papers.summaryZh: Dynalang：让智能体通过预测未来的文本与图像来学习一个多模态世界模型，从而真正「用语言理解世界」并据此行动。把语言纳入世界模型预测目标，连接了大模型与具身控制两条线。
papers.descEn: Dynalang: an agent learns a multimodal world model by predicting future text and images, so it can genuinely 'understand the world through language' and act on it. By folding language into the world model's prediction targets, it bridges large language models and embodied control.

papers.title: Training Agents Inside of Scalable World Models（Dreamer 4）
papers.summaryZh: 可扩展世界模型中的智能体训练（Dreamer 4）：把世界模型扩展到更大规模、更复杂的环境，朝「面向控制的基础模型」迈进，让智能体几乎完全在想象出的世界里学习复杂任务。世界模型走向规模化的最新一步。
papers.descEn: Training Agents Inside of Scalable World Models (Dreamer 4): scales world models to larger, more complex environments toward a 'foundation model for control', letting agents learn complex tasks almost entirely inside an imagined world. The latest step in scaling up world models.

papers.title: A Paths Perspective on Value Learning（价值学习的路径视角）
papers.summaryZh: Saturday Robotics 世界模型读书会 Club 05 选读（Meta FAIR 主讲「面向物理智能的世界模型」）。Distill 经典可视化长文，用「路径」视角直观解释强化学习中价值函数的学习与传播过程。理解基于模型的规划与价值学习的入门读物。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 05 selection. A Distill visual explainer that uses a 'paths' perspective to build intuition for how value functions are learned and propagated in reinforcement learning.

papers.title: EgoMimic：从第一人称人类视频学习灵巧操作
papers.summaryZh: Saturday Robotics 读书会 Club 08「具身人类数据：动作与行为的互联网」选读。研究如何把第一人称（egocentric）人类视频作为大规模数据，迁移到机器人灵巧操作策略学习。具身智能「用人类数据训机器人」路线的代表工作。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Egocentric Human Videos (a.k.a. EgoMimic): using first-person human video as scalable data for robot manipulation policies.

papers.title: EgoBridge：用人类行为先验扩展机器人学习
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。Scaling Robot Learning with Human Behavior Priors（EgoBridge）：以人类行为作为先验，扩展机器人策略的数据规模与泛化能力。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Scaling Robot Learning with Human Behavior Priors (EgoBridge).

papers.title: EMMA：基于表征对齐的跨形态策略学习
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。Cross-Embodiment Policy Learning via Representation Alignment（EMMA）：通过表征对齐实现跨不同机器人形态（cross-embodiment）的策略迁移。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Cross-Embodiment Policy Learning via Representation Alignment (EMMA).

papers.title: 面向可扩展数据采集的人机协同设计
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。Human-Robot Co-Design for Scalable Data Collection：从人机协同设计的角度，提升机器人示范数据采集的可扩展性。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Human-Robot Co-Design for Scalable Data Collection.

papers.title: World Models from Human Experience（从人类经验中学习世界模型）
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。World Models from Human Experience：用人类经验数据学习世界模型，连接具身人类数据与世界模型两条线索。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — World Models from Human Experience.

papers.title: Ego-Exo Transfer（第一/第三人称视角迁移）
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。Ego-Exo Transfer：在第一人称（ego）与第三人称（exo）视角之间迁移，缓解人类视频与机器人观测之间的视角鸿沟。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Ego-Exo Transfer.

papers.title: EgoVerse：面向机器人的互联网级人类动作预训练
papers.summaryZh: Club 08/13 选读。Internet-Scale Human Motion Pretraining for Robotics（EgoVerse）：用互联网级人类动作数据做预训练，为机器人学习提供大规模先验。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08/13 selection — Internet-Scale Human Motion Pretraining for Robotics (EgoVerse).

papers.title: 从人类示范中学习通用机器人策略
papers.summaryZh: Club 08 选读。Learning Generalist Robot Policies from Human Demonstrations：从人类示范出发学习通用（generalist）机器人策略。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 08 selection — Learning Generalist Robot Policies from Human Demonstrations.

papers.title: HumanEgo：用几十分钟人类第一人称视频零样本训练机器人策略
papers.summaryZh: Club 13 主题论文。HumanEgo：仅用 30 分钟左右的人类第一人称视频即可零样本训练出机器人策略（含项目主页与开源代码）。极致的人类数据高效利用样本。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 13 keynote paper — HumanEgo: Zero-Shot Robot Learning from Minutes of Human Egocentric Videos. Project: humanego-ai.github.io · Code: github.com/TX-Leo/HumanEgo.

papers.title: EgoZero
papers.summaryZh: Club 13「第一人称人类数据训练机器人」选读：EgoZero。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 13 selection — EgoZero (egocentric human data for robot learning).

papers.title: AINA
papers.summaryZh: Club 13「第一人称人类数据训练机器人」选读：AINA。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 13 selection — AINA (egocentric human data for robot learning).

papers.title: EgoVLA：基于第一人称数据的视觉-语言-动作模型
papers.summaryZh: Club 13 选读。EgoVLA：结合第一人称人类数据的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 13 selection — EgoVLA (egocentric vision-language-action model).

papers.title: Minimalist Compliance Control（极简柔顺控制）
papers.summaryZh: Club 10「从身体学习人形本能」选读。Minimalist Compliance Control：以极简方式实现机器人柔顺（compliance）控制，提升接触式操作的安全与鲁棒性。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 10 selection — Minimalist Compliance Control.

papers.title: Locomotion Beyond Feet（超越足部的运动）
papers.summaryZh: Club 10 选读。Locomotion Beyond Feet：探索不止依赖足部的机器人运动方式。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 10 selection — Locomotion Beyond Feet.

papers.title: Robot Trains Robot：人形机器人真实世界自动策略自适应
papers.summaryZh: Club 10 选读。Robot Trains Robot：让机器人在真实世界中自动完成人形策略的适应与学习（robot-trains-robot 范式）。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 10 selection — Robot Trains Robot: Automatic Real-World Policy Adaptation and Learning for Humanoids.

papers.title: ToddlerBot：开源人形 loco-manipulation 平台
papers.summaryZh: Club 10 选读。ToddlerBot：面向 ML 的开源人形机器人平台，用于运动-操作（loco-manipulation）研究。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 10 selection — ToddlerBot: Open-Source ML-Compatible Humanoid Platform for Loco-Manipulation.

papers.title: POMDAR：机器人手灵巧度基准
papers.summaryZh: Club 12「灵巧度——我们需要的基准」选读。POMDAR：面向机器人手灵巧操作的基准与评测。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 12 selection — POMDAR (robot-hand dexterity benchmark).

papers.title: AutoEval：机器人策略的自动评测
papers.summaryZh: Club 12 选读。AutoEval：机器人策略评测方法学，朝自动化、可复现的评测推进。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 12 selection — AutoEval (autonomous evaluation methodology for robot policies).

papers.title: ManiFeel：视触觉操作策略学习基准
papers.summaryZh: Club 17「软触觉为中心的多模态智能」选读。ManiFeel：对视觉-触觉（visuotactile）操作策略学习进行基准测试与理解。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 17 selection — ManiFeel: Benchmarking and Understanding Visuotactile Manipulation Policy Learning.

papers.title: 学习具触觉感知的四足 loco-manipulation 策略
papers.summaryZh: Club 17 选读。Learning Tactile-Aware Quadrupedal Loco-Manipulation Policies：让四足机器人结合触觉感知完成运动-操作任务。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 17 selection — Learning Tactile-Aware Quadrupedal Loco-Manipulation Policies.

papers.title: CONTACT：面向机器人拆解的接触感知触觉学习
papers.summaryZh: Club 17 选读。CONTACT：面向机器人拆解（disassembly）任务的接触感知触觉学习。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 17 selection — CONTACT: CONtact-aware TACTile Learning for Robotic Disassembly.

papers.title: 面向机械臂的视觉接近觉与触觉感知（IEEE T-RO 2025）
papers.summaryZh: Club 17 选读。Vision-Based Proximity and Tactile Sensing for Robot Arms：机械臂的视觉接近觉与触觉感知的设计、感知与控制（IEEE Transactions on Robotics, 2025）。
papers.descEn: Reading Club 17 selection — Vision-Based Proximity and Tactile Sensing for Robot Arms: Design, Perception, and Control (IEEE T-RO, 2025).
